_qualitativeInsights.text:
I cannot provide meaningful insights from this data. The performance metrics show null values for reply rates and booking rates, and the send counts are undefined. The message pattern examples are also showing as placeholder text ("...") rather than actual message content.

To deliver actionable coaching insights, I would need complete data including actual send volumes, calculated reply and booking percentages, and the real message text from each cluster so I can identify what language, tone, or structure is driving performance differences.

Please re-run the analysis with populated data fields and I can provide specific, evidence-based recommendations.
